name: Axiom Holdings, Inc.
summary: Axiom Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiaries, engages in power production and hospitality businesses. The company is involved in acquiring, developing, and operating electric generating facilities in China. It operates two hydro-electric generating plants each with an average annual output capacity of 112.5548 million kilowatt hours, as well as purchases and sells power generating equipment. The company sells electricity to National Sichuan Xiaojin County Electricity Supply Company Ltd. It also owns and constructs the Enze Hotel and the Mt. Four Sisters Hotel in Xiaojin County. Axiom Holdings, Inc. is based in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
